subject: Fwd: 10.16.07ACOELet.doc
body:
FYI this is JA's letter.? I have noted the typos, but wanted your thoughts on the substance of the letter? Please advise.


-----Original Message-----
From: John Amerling <john_amerling@earthlink.net>
To: DKIESQ@aol.com
Sent: Wed, 17 Oct 2007 6:57 am
Subject: 10.16.07ACOELet.doc




I have sent you the emails indicating our intent to settle. We need to send out this letter to make it official and move the settlement. We have established credibility and we need to maintain the momentum. May I release this letter today? 



________________________________________________________________________
Email and AIM finally together. You've gotta check out free AOL Mail! - http://mail.aol.com
